LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CROSS-DEFENDANTS ROBERT MOSTOVOY AND LINDA MOSTOVOY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PART OF 1ST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED.
